text.title: Customer Success Basics — Playbooks and Examples
text.summary: Onboarding playbook, at-risk intervention, expansion path, and worked examples for SaaS and course products.

example.note: SaaS team collaboration tool. Success definition: team uses daily, 3+ active projects, 80%+ adoption. Playbook: Day 1 admin onboarding call; Day 7 team training webinar; Day 14 check-in email; Day 30 success review call; Monthly usage report; Quarterly business review. All touchpoints event-triggered where possible (e.g. Day 7 webinar invite only if team has less than 3 projects).

Online course. Success definition: complete 80% of content, implement learnings, achieve stated goal. Playbook: Day 1 welcome + learning roadmap; Day 3 first module completion reminder (if not started); Weekly progress email; Module completion acknowledgment + next steps; Completion survey + testimonial request.

rule.statement: Cap automated re-engagement outreach at one message per week per account. An at-risk account must not receive more than three automated re-engagements before the sequence pauses and escalates to human review.
rule.rationale: Re-engagement spam is the fastest way to convert a disengaged customer into a churned customer who also unsubscribes and leaves a negative review. Automation helps at low volume; at high frequency it accelerates the outcome you are trying to prevent.

list.item: Health band red (score below 50): immediate CSM review, personal outreach within 24 hours
Health band yellow (score 50-74): automated email with specific tip, monitor for 7 days, escalate if no improvement
Health band green (score 75+): maintain regular cadence, watch for expansion signals
Customer hitting plan limits → proactive upgrade offer before they feel blocked
Adding team members → invite prompt for additional seats
Using advanced features → showcase premium tier that extends those features
Requesting a feature → show existing solution + note if upgrade unlocks more
Success milestone reached → celebrate + cross-sell related product
